meta.title: Pushkin Son — boutique apartments in Saint Petersburg
meta.description: Quiet premium stays in four central locations. Request-to-book flow.

Home.heroSubtitle: Apartments in the heart of St. Petersburg
Home.heroLead: Four locations, nineteen spaces for travel or business.
Home.ctaBody: Booking is a request: we confirm availability and details by phone or email.
Home.bookingNote: Online payments come later — the database is already prepared.

Property.calSyncNote: Avito calendar sync is not enabled yet. The property model already reserves fields for an iCal URL and last import time—we will wire this up when you are ready.

Addresses.title: Locations
Addresses.subtitle: All homes are grouped by address

Contacts.title: Contact
Contacts.body: For bookings and partnerships — email or messenger (add your contacts here).

Legal.privacyBody: We process personal data (name, contacts, stay dates) only to handle requests and perform the contract. Cookies may be used for core site features and analytics when enabled. You may request deletion or a copy of your data — add a contact channel here. Access to admin areas is role-based; passwords are stored hashed; use HTTPS in production.
Legal.termsBody: By using the site you agree to data processing and booking rules. Replace this draft with a lawyer-reviewed offer before accepting online payments.
Legal.rulesBody: Check-in from 14:00, check-out by 11:00 unless agreed otherwise. No smoking. Quiet hours — respect neighbours. Deposit and pet fees follow each listing.

Naming.hint: Internal codes (e.g. NKR-01) help staff; guests see a descriptive title and group address.
